name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers emergency short-term loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations nationwide and online lending options.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across the United States, with a significant presence that includes stores in multiple states. The company provides a range of consumer financial products designed for customers seeking quick access to cash and related services. Their service menu includes installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services, positioning them as a one-stop financial services provider for underbanked consumers. The company maintains both physical store locations and online lending capabilities, with customer service available via phone and email for general inquiries and online loan applications. ACE operates within the alternative financial services space, targeting consumers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans or who need rapid access to funds. Their multiple service offerings suggest a strategy to serve various short-term financial needs beyond just payday lending. However, the company's actual loan terms, APR rates, and specific eligibility requirements are not disclosed on the accessible portions of their website. The website content shows 404 errors on specific location and service pages, limiting the detailed verification of current offerings and terms at individual locations.
pros: Multiple service options available including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, and money transfers in a single provider
Online loan application capability for convenience beyond physical store visits
Nationwide store network providing physical location access for in-person transactions
Dedicated customer service with multiple contact channels (phone and email for different departments)
Clear website navigation with store locator tool to find nearby locations
Compliance communication visible (California Notice at Collection for California residents)
cons: Website accessibility issues with 404 errors on specific location and service pages limiting transparency
No interest rates, APR terms, or loan conditions disclosed on accessible website content
Some loan products not available in certain states (error message indicates state-based restrictions)
No information about eligibility requirements, approval times, or typical loan amounts available
Temporary store closures noted (New Orleans locations due to Hurricane Ida) with unclear status
best_for: Consumers needing quick access to cash with existing collateral (title loans)
Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking check cashing or money transfer services
Customers needing multiple financial services in one location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers who need rapid emergency cash access, have collateral for title loans, or prefer in-person service at physical locations. The main caveat is that specific terms, rates, and eligibility information are not available on the accessible website content, requiring direct contact with the company or visiting a store location for accurate pricing and terms.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
